item.description:
Location: North of Biscay
Description:

A Chief Officer (CoC OOW) position is available on a Guard vessel operating in the North of Biscay trade. The contract duration is 1 month +/- 1 month, with joining expected at the end of July. Salary offered is from 180 EUR NET per day. Requirements include a valid OOW certificate, STCW, medical certificate, good English, and experience on vessels up to 500 GT. EU citizenship is necessary for this EU contract.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Officer Job - Guard Vessel (EU Contract) at OJ Crew

item.description:
Location: Offshore, Qatar
Description:

A Chief Officer position is available on a DP2 Crew Boat operating offshore Qatar. Applicants must possess a valid Chief Mate STCW Certificate of Competency and a full DP License. A minimum of 12 months of actual sea-time experience is required, with previous experience on DP2 vessels being preferred. Strong knowledge of DP operations, bridge watchkeeping, passage planning, and COLREGs is essential.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Officer Job on DP2 Crew Boat in Qatar at Milaha

item.description:
Location: Europe
Description:

An experienced 3rd Engineer is sought for a Jack-Up Vessel. Candidates must possess a valid UK Work Permit, previous Jack-Up Vessel experience, a DP Maintenance Certificate, BOSIET, GWO Working at Heights, Chester Step Medical, and a valid Certificate of Competency. European candidates are preferred due to the project location. Willingness to obtain a DP Maintenance Certificate is also considered.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 3rd Engineer Job - Jack-Up Vessel at Select Offshore

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Experienced maritime professionals are sought for Master and Chief Officer positions onboard DP2 Emergency Towing Vessels (ETVs). Required qualifications include a valid Certificate of Competency (CoC), Emergency Towing Operations Training Certificate, and relevant offshore towing or ETV experience. STCW and medical certificates are also mandatory.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Master and Chief Officer Jobs on DP2 ETV at udyashipping.com

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Experienced Master is sought for a Utility Vessel position within the offshore sector. This role requires proven experience in maritime operations. Interested candidates should submit their CV for consideration.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Master Vacancy on Utility Vessel at seaeaglesgroup.com

item.description:
Location: Global
Description:

Experienced professionals are sought for various offshore and oil & gas positions. Immediate hiring is available for roles including Driller, Assistant Driller, Roustabouts, HSE Advisor, Floormen, MWD/DDX Engineer, Rig Electrician, Sr. Repair & Maintenance Technician, and Sr. Drilling Engineer. Opportunities are located across multiple global regions, with some specific to the North Sea, Drillship (Las Palmas), Gulf of Thailand, and Kuwait. Candidates available for short notice joining are encouraged to apply.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Offshore Oil Gas Job Opportunities at SEA Updates
[Gold Job] ETO DP | Supply Vessel at
[Gold Job] 2ND ENGINEER DP FOR OFFSHORE VESSEL at

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Multiple experienced professionals are sought for various offshore positions within leading marine, heavy lift, construction, hook-up, commissioning, and oil & gas projects. Roles include Electrical DP Vessel Lead, ECR Electronic Engineer, Junior Offshore Shift Supervisor, Deck Foreman, Heavy Lift Crane Operator, Rig Chief Mechanic, Commissioning Lead, Hook-Up Engineer, HSE Officer, and NDT Technician. Candidates with relevant offshore construction, heavy lift vessel, hook-up, commissioning, maintenance, or marine operations experience are encouraged to apply.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Offshore Marine Oil Gas Project Vacancies at Golden Jobs

item.description:
Location: Abu Dhabi, UAE
Description:

Multiple offshore roles are available on a leading Oil & Gas project in Abu Dhabi, UAE. The rotation is 90 days on and 30 days off, with free food, accommodation, transportation, and two-way air tickets provided. Relevant offshore Oil & Gas experience and UAE/GCC licenses or certifications are required. Excellent career growth opportunities are offered.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Offshore Oil Gas Project Vacancies in Abu Dhabi at Stepping Stone HR
